content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_TransferOrders
-- drop view v_TransferOrders
as
SELECT      A.*
--,           B.[In Transit Date]
--,           B.[In Transit Qty]
,           C.[Receipt Date]
,           C.[Received Qty]
,           [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] as [Open Qty]
FROM
(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [Create Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           MM.ITDS AS      [Description]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [Transfer Qty]
,           MT.RESP AS         [User]
,           LEFT(WHSL,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(WHSL,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '51'
) A

/*LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [In Transit Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [In Transit Qty]
,           LEFT(WHSL,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(WHSL,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '52'
) B on A.[Transfer Order] = B.[Transfer Order] and A.[Originating Warehouse] = B.[Originating Warehouse] 
    and A.[Destination Warehouse] = B.[Destination Warehouse] and A.[Order Line] = B.[Order Line]
*/
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT RIDN AS         [Transfer Order]
,           TRDT AS         [Receipt Date]
,           RIDL AS         [Order Line]
,           MT.ITNO AS      [Item Number]
,           ABS(MT.TRQT) AS   [Received Qty]
,           LEFT(RFTX,3) as [Originating Warehouse]
,           RIGHT(RFTX,3) as [Destination Warehouse]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM on MT.ITNO = MM.ITNO
WHERE       TTYP = '50'
) C on A.[Transfer Order] = C.[Transfer Order] and A.[Originating Warehouse] = C.[Originating Warehouse] 
    and A.[Destination Warehouse] = C.[Destination Warehouse] and A.[Order Line] = C.[Order Line]

WHERE [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] < 0 or [Received Qty] - [Transfer Qty] is null
